info.name: Mom Care Platform API - Current Implementation
info.description:
API collection for the Mom Care Platform backend (Ktor 3.2.3) - Production-ready implementation with configurable refresh token authentication and mom authorization system:

🔐 **Authentication System**: Refresh token mechanism with configurable expiration and idle timeout
🔄 **Refresh Tokens**: Automatic token rotation with configurable security parameters
⚙️ **Configuration**: Customizable token expiration via application.yaml
🛡️ **Mom Authorization**: Session-based authorization system - moms must attend 8+ sessions to access e-commerce features
✅ **Enhanced Validation**: Phone format, email format, password strength, marital status enum, doctor specialization enum
🔒 **Security Fixes**: Required fields validation prevents silent defaults and accidental data resets
👩 **Mom Profile Management**: Profile CRUD with session tracking, authorization status, and photo uploads
👨‍⚕️ **Doctor Profile Management**: Profile CRUD with real-time authorization checks and photo uploads
⚙️ **Admin Operations**: Doctor authorization management with real-time access control
📦 **Category Management**: Full CRUD operations for product categories
🛍️ **Product Catalog**: Full CRUD operations with search and filtering (REQUIRES MOM AUTHORIZATION)
💰 **SKU Offers**: Product pricing and offer management (REQUIRES MOM AUTHORIZATION)
🛒 **Shopping Cart**: Complete cart management with add, update, remove, and clear operations (REQUIRES MOM AUTHORIZATION)
📁 **File Upload**: Static file serving for photos and NID documents
🧪 **Unit Tests**: Comprehensive test coverage (59 tests) including authorization scenarios

**Base URL**: http://localhost:8080
**Auth**: Bearer token (automatically managed via refresh token)
**Test Accounts**: 
- **Moms**: alice@example.com (3 sessions, unauthorized), beth@example.com (8 sessions, authorized) - password: password123
- **Doctors**: dr.smith@example.com (authorized), dr.brown@example.com (unauthorized) - password: password123
- **Admin**: admin@momcare.com - password: admin123

✅ **Current Endpoints**: 39 endpoints fully implemented and tested
🔄 **Token Configuration**: Customizable via application.yaml (accessTokenExpiryMinutes, refreshTokenExpiryDays, idleTimeoutHours, momAuthorizationSessionThreshold)
🛡️ **E-Commerce Security**: All product, SKU offer, and cart endpoints require mom authorization (isAuthorized: true)

**Latest Updates**:
- Fixed doctor profile update serialization (kotlinx.serialization → Gson)
- Enhanced doctor validation with proper specialization enum values
- Updated all doctor profile endpoints to use Gson for JSON deserialization
- Fixed test script specialization values (uppercase enum values)
- All comprehensive tests now passing (6 test suites, 0 failed)
- Updated Swagger documentation and Postman collection

item.name: 🔐 Authentication
item.description: Authentication endpoints for Mom and Doctor registration/login with multipart file upload support. Both registration endpoints return the same response format as login for consistency. Registration endpoints require photo, nidFront, and nidBack files. All JSON deserialization uses Gson for lenient parsing, allowing optional fields without default values.

request.description: Register a new mom with profile photo and NID documents. All files (photo, nidFront, nidBack) are REQUIRED. Files are only saved if email is unique. Returns same response format as login for consistency.

Register a new doctor with profile photo and NID documents. All files (photo, nidFront, nidBack) are REQUIRED. Files are only saved if email is unique. Returns same response format as login for consistency.
Universal login endpoint for both Moms and Doctors. Returns JWT access token, refresh token, userType, userId, expiresIn, and refreshExpiresIn.
Use refresh token to get new access token. Access tokens expire in 30 minutes, refresh tokens expire in 30 days with 24-hour idle timeout.
Revoke refresh token to logout user from all devices. This invalidates the refresh token.

exec: console.log('Logged out successfully. All tokens cleared.');

item.name: � Mom Profile Management
item.description: Mom profile endpoints with JWT authentication, session tracking, and authorization status management. Includes multipart photo upload support and session update functionality that automatically manages authorization status. Multipart endpoints use Gson for lenient JSON parsing, allowing optional fields without default values.

request.description: Get authenticated mom's profile information. Requires JWT token with userType: MOM. Available to all authenticated moms regardless of e-commerce authorization status.
Update mom profile with JSON data only (no file upload).

response.name: Invalid Marital Status
Invalid Phone Format

request.description: Update mom profile with multipart form data including profile photo upload.
Update mom profile with partial data only (no file upload). Demonstrates that all fields are optional in multipart requests.

Update the number of sessions for the authenticated mom. SECURITY NOTE: The numberOfSessions field is required - requests without this field will be rejected with 400 Bad Request to prevent accidental session resets from malformed requests.
Check current mom's authorization status. ACCESSIBLE TO BOTH AUTHORIZED AND UNAUTHORIZED MOMS - allows unauthorized moms to check their status. Returns isAuthorized status and momId.

item.name: 👨‍⚕️ Doctor Profile Management
item.description: Doctor profile endpoints with JWT authentication and multipart photo upload support. Multipart endpoints use Gson for lenient JSON parsing, allowing optional fields without default values.

request.description: Check current doctor's authorization status. ACCESSIBLE TO BOTH AUTHORIZED AND UNAUTHORIZED DOCTORS - allows unauthorized doctors to check their status. Returns isAuthorized status and doctorId.
Get authenticated doctor's profile information. Requires JWT token with userType: DOCTOR.

Update doctor profile with JSON data using Gson deserialization. All fields are optional. Specialization must be one of: PSYCHIATRIST, CLINICAL_PSYCHOLOGIST, PERINATAL_MENTAL_HEALTH, FAMILY_THERAPIST, GROUP_THERAPIST. Note: isAuthorized field cannot be updated by doctors - only admins can change authorization status.

response.name: Successful Profile Update
response.body:
{
    "success": true,
    "message": "Profile updated successfully",
    "data": {
        "id": "doctor_smith",
        "name": "Dr. John Smith Updated",
        "email": "dr.smith@example.com",
        "phone": "+1-555-8888",
        "specialization": "CLINICAL_PSYCHOLOGIST",
        "photoUrl": "uploads/profiles/doctor_smith_photo.jpg",
        "nidFront": "uploads/nids/doctor_front_67890.jpg",
        "nidBack": "uploads/nids/doctor_back_67890.jpg",
        "createdAt": 1640995200000,
        "updatedAt": 1641081600000
    }
}

response.name: Invalid Specialization

request.description: Update doctor profile with multipart form data including profile photo upload. Uses Gson for JSON deserialization of the data field. Specialization must be one of: PSYCHIATRIST, CLINICAL_PSYCHOLOGIST, PERINATAL_MENTAL_HEALTH, FAMILY_THERAPIST, GROUP_THERAPIST.

Update doctor profile with partial data only (no file upload). Uses Gson for JSON deserialization. Demonstrates that all fields are optional in multipart requests. Specialization must be one of: PSYCHIATRIST, CLINICAL_PSYCHOLOGIST, PERINATAL_MENTAL_HEALTH, FAMILY_THERAPIST, GROUP_THERAPIST.

item.name: 📦 Categories (Public)
item.description: Public category browsing endpoints - no authentication required

request.description: Fetch all product categories (public endpoint - no auth required)
Fetch specific category by ID (public endpoint - no auth required)

item.name: � File Uploads
item.description: Static file serving and upload verification endpoints

request.description: Access uploaded files via static file serving. Files are stored with UUID naming for security.

item.name: 🛍️ Product Catalog (Mom-Only)
item.description: Product browsing endpoints for authorized moms - REQUIRES MOM AUTHORIZATION (isAuthorized: true) for viewing products. Unauthorized moms will receive 403 Forbidden responses. CRUD operations are admin-only.

request.description: Get all products with pagination support
Get specific product details by ID
Get products filtered by category with pagination
Search products by name with pagination

item.name: 💰 SKU Offers (Mom-Only)
item.description: SKU offer browsing endpoints for authorized moms - REQUIRES MOM AUTHORIZATION (isAuthorized: true) for viewing offers. Unauthorized moms will receive 403 Forbidden responses. CRUD operations are admin-only.

request.description: Get all active SKU offers
Get specific SKU offer by ID
Get all offers for a specific SKU
Get all offers from a specific seller
Get the best (lowest price) active offer for a SKU

item.name: 🧪 Validation Examples
item.description: Examples demonstrating validation errors for registration endpoints

request.description: Example of invalid email format validation error
Example of invalid phone number format validation error
Example of invalid marital status validation error
Example of invalid specialization validation error
Example of password too short validation error

item.name: ⚙️ Admin Operations
item.description: Administrative endpoints for managing doctor authorization and e-commerce CRUD operations (products, categories, SKU offers) - REQUIRES ADMIN AUTHENTICATION

request.description: Update a doctor's authorization status (authorize or revoke access)
Get a doctor's current authorization status
Get mom's session count and authorization status for administrative monitoring (Admin only)
Create a new product (Admin only)
Update an existing product (Admin only)
Delete a product (Admin only)
Create a new category (Admin only). Slug is optional - if not provided, will be auto-generated from name. Returns 201 Created with the created category data.
Update an existing category (Admin only)
Delete a category (Admin only)
Create a new SKU offer (Admin only)
Update an existing SKU offer (Admin only)
Delete a SKU offer (Admin only)

item.name: 🛒 Shopping Cart
item.description: Shopping cart management endpoints for moms - REQUIRES MOM AUTHORIZATION (isAuthorized: true). Unauthorized moms will receive 403 Forbidden responses.

request.description: Get the current mom's shopping cart
Add an item to the cart with specific offer
Update the quantity of a specific item in the cart
Remove a specific item from the cart
Clear all items from the cart

item.name: 📦 Order Management
item.description: Order management endpoints for moms - REQUIRES MOM AUTHORIZATION (isAuthorized: true). Unauthorized moms will receive 403 Forbidden responses.

request.description: Get paginated list of user's orders
Get details of a specific order by ID
Create a new order from provided items
Create a new order from items in user's cart
Update the status of a specific order

item.name: 🏥 Health & Monitoring
item.description: Health check endpoints for monitoring and container orchestration

request.description: Get comprehensive health status including service info, timestamp, and environment
Get readiness status with database and external service checks
Simple liveness check for container orchestration
